findings.evidence: Adjacent declarations use `comp_addMonoidHom`, `comp_addMonoidHom_iff_of_surjective`, and `comp_addEquiv_iff` in `code/TauCeti/Analysis/PositiveDefinite/Pullback.lean:66`, `:95`, `:102`; Mathlib also uses underscore suffixes such as `ContDiff.comp_continuousLinearMap` (`mathlib/Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus/ContDiff/Basic.lean:419`). New names occur at `SemigroupGroupPullback.lean:90`, `:121`, `:128`, `:161`, `:167`, `:172`.
findings.fix: Rename them to `comp_spatial_addMonoidHom`, `comp_spatial_addMonoidHom_iff_of_surjective`, `comp_spatial_addEquiv_iff`, `comp_spatial_continuousLinearMap`, `comp_spatial_continuousLinearEquiv_iff`, and `comp_spatial_continuousLinearMap_and_continuous`, updating references and docstrings.
findings.issue: Bundled-map variants `comp_spatialAddMonoidHom`, `comp_spatialAddMonoidHom_iff_of_surjective`, `comp_spatialAddEquiv_iff`, `comp_spatialContinuousLinearMap`, `comp_spatialContinuousLinearEquiv_iff`, and `comp_spatialContinuousLinearMap_and_continuous` do not follow the adjacent API’s suffix convention.

summary: The new API has a naming inconsistency with the adjacent positive-definite pullback API: bundled-map suffixes are fused onto `spatial` instead of separated as suffixes. Rename those declarations before exposing them.
